# dependencytrack_license (Data Source)

Fetch a license by SPDX ID

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "dependencytrack_license" "example" {
  id = "MIT"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) SPDX ID of the license.

### Read-Only

- `comment` (String) Comment on the license.
- `fsf_libre` (Boolean) Whether the license is considered libre by Free Software Foundation.
- `header` (String) Header of the license.
- `is_deprecated_license_id` (Boolean) Whether the License ID used is deprecated.
- `name` (String) Name of the license.
- `osi_approved` (Boolean) Whether the license is approved by Open Source Initiative.
- `see_also` (List of String) Links to external information about license.
- `template` (String) Template of the license.
- `text` (String) Text of the license.
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the license.
